onboarding.subtitle: To get started, choose a TTS model

permissions.title: Permissions Required
permissions.description: Parrot needs a couple of permissions to work properly.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Access
accessibility.description: Required to paste text into your applications.

errors.checkFailed: Failed to check permissions. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: Failed to request permission. Please try again.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} Settings
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: This model works automatically with no configuration needed.

kokoroVoice.title: Voice
kokoroVoice.description: Select which Kokoro voice to use. Auto follows the language setting.

speak.name: Read Aloud Shortcut
speak.description: Read the selected text aloud. Press again to stop.

errors.reset: Failed to reset shortcut to original value

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language for text-to-speech synthesis.
language.descriptionUnsupported: This model does not support language selection.

models.title: TTS Models
models.description: Select a text-to-speech model or download additional models.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{modelName}}? You will need to download it again to use it.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} is your active model. Deleting it will stop speech until you select a new model. Are you sure?

audioFeedback.label: Audio Feedback
audioFeedback.description: Play sound when speech starts and stops

outputDevice.title: Output Device
outputDevice.description: Select your preferred audio output device for feedback sounds

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Adjust the volume of audio feedback sounds

ttsWorkers.title: TTS Workers
ttsWorkers.description: Number of parallel synthesis engines. Auto uses your CPU core count to decide.

shortenFirstChunk.title: Fast First Response
shortenFirstChunk.description: Synthesize a shorter first chunk for faster time-to-speech, then use longer chunks.

experimentalToggle.label: Experimental Features
experimentalToggle.description: Enable experimental features that are still in development.

startHidden.label: Start Hidden
startHidden.description: Launch to system tray without opening the window.

autostart.label: Launch on Startup
autostart.description: Automatically start Parrot when you log in to your computer.

showTrayIcon.label: Show Tray Icon
showTrayIcon.description: Display the Parrot icon in the system tray.

overlay.title: Overlay Position
overlay.description: Display visual feedback overlay during speech playback. On Linux 'None' is recommended.

modelUnload.title: Unload Model
modelUnload.description: Automatically free GPU/CPU memory when the model hasn't been used for the specified time

history.title: History
history.empty: No spoken text yet. Use the shortcut to start speaking!
history.deleteError: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.

logDirectory.title: Log Directory
logDirectory.description: Location where log files are stored

updateChecks.label: Check for Updates
updateChecks.description: Automatically check for new versions of Parrot

soundTheme.label: Sound Theme
soundTheme.description: Choose a sound theme for speech start and stop feedback

historyLimit.title: History Limit
historyLimit.description: Maximum number of history entries to keep

historyRetention.title: Auto-Delete History
historyRetention.description: Automatically delete old history entries to save space

keyboardImplementation.title: Keyboard Implementation
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: Keyboard shortcuts were incompatible and reset to defaults

appDataDirectory.title: App Data Directory
appDataDirectory.description: Location where Parrot stores its data

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: The original project that Parrot was forked from
handy.details: Parrot is a fork of Handy by CJ Pais. Thanks for building the foundation that made Parrot possible.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: Parrot needs accessibility permissions to function properly.

appLanguage.title: Application Language
appLanguage.description: Change the language of the Parrot interface
